task.title: Creating a Project
task.shortdesc: Initialize a new AcmeDoc project with a map, sample topics, and build configuration.

context.p: A project consists of a DITA map, topic files, and build properties. This task walks you through creating one from scratch.

info.p: Create maps/guide.ditamap with your topic references:
info.codeblock: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE map PUBLIC "-//OASIS//DTD DITA Map//EN" "map.dtd"> <map id="guide"> <title>My Guide</title> <topicref href="../topics/overview.dita"/> </map>

Overview An overview of the project.

Add your content here.

info.note: If you have a custom plug-in installed, your overrides will apply automatically.

result.p: Your project is created. Open out/html5/index.html in a browser to view the output.
